key_facts: As of end-2022: 2,958 customer power plants under management
Specializes in wind/solar power forecasting SaaS and distributed PV monitoring management systems
AI-powered new energy forecasting LLM released (name not disclosed)
Serves grid operators and asset managers primarily
Distributed monitoring product manages provincial and prefecture-level new energy portfolios

funding_history.notes: IPO provides liquidity and growth capital for SaaS expansion

business_model_notes: B2B SaaS for power grid operators and solar asset managers. Core product: AI-powered renewable energy output forecasting (next-day, next-hour predictions) that grid operators need for dispatch planning. Secondary product: distributed PV monitoring and management for large portfolios. Revenue: SaaS subscription based on GW under management and forecast accuracy. The LLM for energy forecasting (2024) shows investment in AI differentiation vs simpler monitoring tools.
competitive_position: Listed market leader in solar monitoring SaaS segment for enterprise/grid customers. Revenue of CNY 550M (2024) and 24.19% CAGR establish it as one of the largest pure-play solar O&M software companies in China. Main differentiator vs SOLARMAN: serves grid operators who need forecasting (not just real-time monitoring); serves utility-scale + large distributed portfolios rather than individual residential systems.
research_notes: Highest confidence (★5). All figures from ChiNext (301162.SZ) publicly disclosed annual reports. CAGR calculation verifiable from multi-year revenue data. AI LLM release from company investor relations announcement. 2,958 customer plants figure from year-end 2022 prospectus supplement.
